languages.text: "Жизнеформа, оборудованная аугментацией, поступила на корабль вместе с прочими вливаниями со стороны Райкад Минорис и обитала в пушечных отсеках корабля. Один из слуг Бога-Машины заметил на ней несоответствующую уровню эффективности священную аугментацию, и жизнеформа была доставлена сюда".

"This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."
languages.original_text: "Жизнеформа, оборудованная аугментацией, поступила на корабль вместе с прочими вливаниями со стороны Райкад Минорис и обитала в пушечных отсеках корабля. Один из слуг Бога-Машины заметил на ней несоответствующую уровню эффективности священную аугментацию, и жизнеформа была доставлена сюда".

traits.locale_text: "This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

"This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

"The carrier of the valuable augmentation was living in the ship's cannon bays. One tech-comrade noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a unit, and the transgressor was brought here."

"This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

"This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

languages.text: 「貴重な増幅器を運んでいたユニットが、艦の砲倉にいた。性能の高い聖なる増幅器を、そんなユニットが身につけていることに、技術者仲間が気づき、違反者はこちらに連れてこられた」
languages.original_text: "The carrier of the valuable augmentation was living in the ship's cannon bays. One tech-comrade noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a unit, and the transgressor was brought here."

traits.locale_text: 「貴重な増幅器を運んでいたユニットが、艦の砲倉にいた。性能の高い聖なる増幅器を、そんなユニットが身につけていることに、技術者仲間が気づき、違反者はこちらに連れてこられた」

languages.text: "Bu ogmentli yaşam formu, Rykad Minoris'ten gelen diğer takviye birliklerle birlikte gemiye geldi. O zamandan beri geminin top ateşleme bölümlerinde yaşıyor. Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârlarından biri, yüksek performanslı kutsal bir ogmetiğin böyle bir yaşam formu tarafından taşınmasındaki tutarsızlığı fark etmesi üzerine buraya getirildi."
languages.original_text: "This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

traits.locale_text: "Bu ogmentli yaşam formu, Rykad Minoris'ten gelen diğer takviye birliklerle birlikte gemiye geldi. O zamandan beri geminin top ateşleme bölümlerinde yaşıyor. Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârlarından biri, yüksek performanslı kutsal bir ogmetiğin böyle bir yaşam formu tarafından taşınmasındaki tutarsızlığı fark etmesi üzerine buraya getirildi."

languages.text: «Esta forma de vida aumentada llegó junto con el resto de los refuerzos de Rykad Minoris y, desde entonces, ha vivido en los compartimentos de artillería de la nave. Uno de los sirvientes del Dios Máquina reparó en la incongruencia de encontrar un aumético sagrado de tan alto rendimiento en una forma de vida de estas características y lo trajo aquí».
languages.original_text: "This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

traits.locale_text: «Esta forma de vida aumentada llegó junto con el resto de los refuerzos de Rykad Minoris y, desde entonces, ha vivido en los compartimentos de artillería de la nave. Uno de los sirvientes del Dios Máquina reparó en la incongruencia de encontrar un aumético sagrado de tan alto rendimiento en una forma de vida de estas características y lo trajo aquí».

languages.text: “这个加装了植入物的生命体，是随小莱卡德补充兵员一同登舰的，之后便一直待在舰上的炮舱里。一位万机之神的仆人注意到，这样一个生命体身上却装备着高性能的神圣生体强化，这种不协调引起了怀疑，于是他便被带到了这里。”
languages.original_text: "This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

traits.locale_text: “这个加装了植入物的生命体，是随小莱卡德补充兵员一同登舰的，之后便一直待在舰上的炮舱里。一位万机之神的仆人注意到，这样一个生命体身上却装备着高性能的神圣生体强化，这种不协调引起了怀疑，于是他便被带到了这里。”

languages.text: « Cette entité augmentée est arrivée à bord avec le reste du ravitaillement de Rykad Minoris et s'est depuis installée dans les compartiments de canonnage du vaisseau. Un serviteur du Dieu-Machine a remarqué la disparité entre l'entité et la qualité de ses augmétiques sacrés, après quoi celle-ci a été conduite ici. »
languages.original_text: "This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

traits.locale_text: « Cette entité augmentée est arrivée à bord avec le reste du ravitaillement de Rykad Minoris et s'est depuis installée dans les compartiments de canonnage du vaisseau. Un serviteur du Dieu-Machine a remarqué la disparité entre l'entité et la qualité de ses augmétiques sacrés, après quoi celle-ci a été conduite ici. »

languages.text: "Diese augmentierte Lebensform kam mit dem übrigen Nachschub von Rykad Minoris an Bord und lebt seitdem in den Kanonenmodulen des Schiffs. "Einer der Diener des Maschinengottes bemerkte die Inkongruenz einer hochwertigen, heiligen Augmentation in einer derartigen Lebensform, und er wurde hierher gebracht."
languages.original_text: "This augmented life form arrived on board along with the rest of the replenishment from Rykad Minoris and has since dwelled in the ship's cannon bays. One of the servants of the Machine God noticed the incongruity of a high-performance sacred augmetic being worn by such a life form, and he was brought here."

"Einer der Diener des Maschinengottes bemerkte die Inkongruenz einer hochwertigen, heiligen Augmentation in einer derartigen Lebensform, und er wurde hierher gebracht."
